summary: The diff shows that MenuSection.tsx has been updated to use Mexican food image assets (tacos, beef-tacos, quesadillas, chips-salsa, burritos) and CateringSection.tsx uses catering-banner.dim_1200x600.png per the file summary. All five requirements appear to be addressed. However, the image filenames used in the implementation differ from the specified version 9 asset filenames in the build request. The build request constraint states images must come from existing version 9 assets already in the project at frontend/public/assets/generated with specific filenames and dimensions.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the first menu item card image with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9 (taco-menu-item.dim_600x400.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff uses '/assets/generated/tacos.dim_800x600.png' instead of the specified version 9 asset 'taco-menu-item.dim_600x400.png'. The filename and dimensions differ from what was specified in the build request constraints.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the third menu item card image with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9 (quesadilla-menu-item.dim_600x400.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff uses '/assets/generated/quesadillas.dim_800x600.png' instead of the specified version 9 asset 'quesadilla-menu-item.dim_600x400.png'. The filename and dimensions differ from what was specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the fourth menu item card image with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9 (chips-salsa-menu-item.dim_600x400.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff uses '/assets/generated/chips-salsa.dim_800x600.png' instead of the specified version 9 asset 'chips-salsa-menu-item.dim_600x400.png'. The filename and dimensions differ from what was specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the fifth menu item card image with the correct original Mexican food image from version 9 (burrito-menu-item.dim_600x400.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff uses '/assets/generated/burritos.dim_800x600.png' instead of the specified version 9 asset 'burrito-menu-item.dim_600x400.png'. The filename and dimensions differ from what was specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Card order updated to match version 9 sequence, reordering menu items beyond what was requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to replace images in specific articles (1, 3, 4, 5) and explicitly states not to modify menu item cards not listed in selected elements. Reordering the card sequence is a structural change not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: HeroSection background image updated to use smoke-free hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png asset.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only targets five specific XPath elements related to menu item cards and catering section. Changing the hero section background image was not requested.
